hero.eyebrow: SMM, websites and content for brands ready to grow
hero.title: We build a digital presence people watch, like and remember
hero.text: From strategy and visual language to content and websites that guide customers toward action.
services.title: We propose
services.smm.title: Social Media Marketing
services.smm.text: We manage pages with a system: strategy, content pillars, posting, analytics and regular improvements.
services.web.title: Web Development
services.web.text: We create landing pages and websites that explain value fast and help generate qualified requests.
services.content.title: Content Creation
services.content.text: We write, shoot and package content so it feels alive, recognizable and right for the channel.
services.branding.title: Branding
services.branding.text: We shape tone, visual direction and a first impression that does not get lost in the feed.
about.title: We combine marketing, design and development into one clear process
about.text: SmmAge works with small and medium-sized brands that need not just a beautiful page, but a specific goal we move toward together. From logos and brand books to online stores for products and services.
formats.title: We present
formats.sites.title: Sites
formats.sites.text: Corporate websites, portfolios and service pages.
formats.landing.title: Landing
formats.landing.text: One-page websites for launches or a focused offer.
formats.social.title: Social Media
formats.social.text: Content systems for Instagram, TikTok, Telegram and other channels.
projects.title: Our projects
comments.title: User comments
comments.first.name: Maria
comments.first.text: The team quickly understood our style and created a suitable website for selling flowers. There were many edits and calls, but the work was done at a high level.
comments.second.name: Oleksii
comments.second.text: After launching the landing page, it became much easier to explain the service and receive requests.

project.one.title: Website for a leisure space
project.one.text: An atmospheric page focused on visuals, location benefits and a fast path to booking.

project.two.title: Content system for a local brand
project.two.text: We refreshed the page style, built content pillars and prepared creative materials for regular publications.

footer.text: A digital team for brands that need a website and content working in one rhythm.
service.process: We work in short stages to show the first result quickly
service.examples.title: What we can create
service.ctaTitle: Want to understand what fits your project?
service.ctaText: Describe the task and we will suggest a simple starting plan without extra complexity.
service.pages.smm.title: Social Media Marketing
service.pages.smm.text: We build a recognizable social media presence for the brand: from positioning and content pillars to planning, posting and analytics.
service.pages.web.title: Web Development
service.pages.web.text: We design websites that explain the offer quickly, look clean across screens and guide visitors toward a request.
service.pages.content.title: Content Creation
service.pages.content.text: We help the brand sound alive: ideas, copy, scripts, visuals and short formats for social media.
service.pages.branding.title: Branding
service.pages.branding.text: We help build the brand foundation so pages and websites feel consistent and recognizable.
